name: Cerebras
description: Registers Cerebras Inference as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Cerebras API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Cerebras API key
settings.description: Cerebras API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to CEREBRAS_API_KEY.

providers.name: Cerebras
providers.description: Refreshes Cerebras chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
